category: Sources of Self-Generated or Stored Light
explanation: Firefly, Anglerfish, Glow-in-the-dark Toy, and Will-o'-the-wisp all emit their own visible light (through bioluminescence, phosphorescence, or natural phenomena), whereas the Moon only reflects light from the Sun.
All tokens except the Great Pyramid of Giza represent one of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World that has been destroyed. The Great Pyramid of Giza is the only one still largely intact today.

"Weave", "Knit", "Crochet", and "Braid" are all distinct methods or techniques used to create textiles or intertwine strands. "Needle" is a tool often used in some of these crafts, but it is not a crafting technique itself.
